save.title: GameSave
save.description: Stores user incremental game save state

userId.description: Unique identifier of the matching authenticated user

starsCount.description: Number of flying auto-clicking stars owned

purchasedAnimals.description: Key-value pair of animal species to count

purchasedUpgrades.description: List of technologies or purchased perks researched

planetLevel.description: Current evolution level of the planet

planetExp.description: Current experience points of the planet

clicksCount.description: Total manual clicks performed on the planet

prestigeCount.description: Prestige reset count of the player

glitterDust.description: Glitter dust currency obtained from duplicates

cosmeticRarityLevels.description: User upgrades of cosmetics rarity levels mapping id to upgraded value

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this save was first initiated

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when progress was last synced

leaderboard.title: LeaderboardEntry
leaderboard.description: Public leaderboard record mapping user's total life earned to display name

userId.description: Unique identifier of the matching authenticated user

userName.description: Display name or masked identification for public ranking lists

prestigeCount.description: Prestige reset count of the player

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when this record was updated

/saves/{userId}.description: Stores user progress securely by authenticating user ID

/leaderboard/{userId}.description: Stores user leaderboard score publicly readable by everyone, but writably guarded by matching user identification
